name: leads
description: Manage leads — add a lead, get all leads, get all archived leads. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: The ID of the user which will be the owner of the created lead. If not provided, the user making the request will be used.

parameters.name: label_ids
parameters.description: The IDs of the lead labels which will be associated with the lead

parameters.name: person_id
parameters.description: The ID of a person which this lead will be linked to. If the person does not exist yet, it needs to be created first. This property is required unless `organization_id` is specified.

parameters.name: organization_id
parameters.description: The ID of an organization which this lead will be linked to. If the organization does not exist yet, it needs to be created first. This property is required unless `person_id` is specified.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The potential value of the lead represented by a JSON object: `{ "amount": 200, "currency": "EUR" }`. Both amount and currency are required.

parameters.name: expected_close_date
parameters.description: The date of when the deal which will be created from the lead is expected to be closed. In ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: visible_to
parameters.description:
The visibility of the lead. If omitted, the visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user. Read more about visibility groups here.

Light / Growth and Professional plans

ValueDescription
`1`Owner & followers
`3`Entire company

Premium / Ultimate plan

ValueDescription
`1`Owner only
`3`Owner's visibility group
`5`Owner's visibility group and sub-groups
`7`Entire company

parameters.name: was_seen
parameters.description: A flag indicating whether the lead was seen by someone in the Pipedrive UI

parameters.name: origin_id
parameters.description: The optional ID to further distinguish the origin of the lead - e.g. Which API integration created this lead. If omitted, `origin_id` will be set to null.
